'''thadapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docibility|docibility]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docibility|docibility]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thadapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thædæpæth|thædæpæth]] || [[word:thædæpæj|thædæpæj]] || [[word:thædæpæsh|thædæpæsh]] || [[word:thædæpæ|thædæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadadapath|thadadapath]] || [[word:thadadapaj|thadadapaj]] || [[word:thadadapash|thadadapash]] || [[word:thadadapa|thadadapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadapath|thadapath]] || [[word:thadapaj|thadapaj]] || [[word:thadapash|thadapash]] || [[word:thadapa|thadapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadafpath|thadafpath]] || [[word:thadafpaj|thadafpaj]] || [[word:thadafpash|thadafpash]] || [[word:thadafpaf|thadafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thadapatha|thadapatha]] || [[word:thadapaja|thadapaja]] || [[word:thadapasha|thadapasha]] || [[word:thadapaka|thadapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thadapath|thadapath]] || [[word:thadapaj|thadapaj]] || [[word:thadapash|thadapash]] || [[word:thadapa|thadapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thadapathal|thadapathal]] || [[word:thadapajal|thadapajal]] || [[word:thadapashal|thadapashal]] || [[word:thadapakal|thadapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thadapathatha|thadapathatha]] || [[word:thadapajaja|thadapajaja]] || [[word:thadapashasha|thadapashasha]] || [[word:thadapaka|thadapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thadapathan|thadapathan]] || [[word:thadapajan|thadapajan]] || [[word:thadapashan|thadapashan]] || [[word:thadapakan|thadapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thadapathaoro|thadapathaoro]] || [[word:thadapajaoro|thadapajaoro]] || [[word:thadapashaoro|thadapashaoro]] || [[word:thadapakaoro|thadapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
